_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Government cancels all Raya open houses' → 'government agencies, GLCs and GLICs; private and household events not in scope'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — '1.8 minutes of daily fuel subsidy' arithmetic-mismatch line (recalculated as ~3 hours, but framing dropped to avoid rhetorical anchor).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'savings are a fraction of RM4B monthly fuel subsidy' → factual juxtaposition of RM15-25M lost revenue vs RM4B/month subsidy estimate.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Malaysia's most cross-racial political tradition' superlative → 'established part of official calendar; fosters inter-community ties' (policy framing only).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'taxpayer-funded patronage vehicle' framing → 'taxpayer-funded; RM2.88M for 2013 PM/Cabinet open house' (documented example).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Malay MP hosting diverse guests is real muhibbah and contract signalling' (contract-signalling not verified).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Caterers and tent firms book RM15-25M' → 'private-sector revenue across ministries and agencies estimated at RM15-25M'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Female caterers and women-led food SMEs lose real income' specific identification → softer framing referencing DOSM women-owned F&B records.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Rural constituents lose their one annual face-to-face access to YB' (no constituency-level evidence).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Catering is female-dominated' ownership/employment claim.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Kampung auntie / T20 networkers' rhetorical class framing.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Potluck / smaller tent at near-zero cost' (no feasibility/cost source).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'The government chose a total ban' → 'full ban for the sectors named' (govt agencies/GLCs/GLICs).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'all-or-nothing signals optics not optimisation' → 'PMO framed as spending moderation; signal lands depends on other cost lines'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Every party plays this in power and mourns it out; ban returns when oil drops or election nears' (cross-administration generalisation + prediction).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): View → 'published procurement and audited costs for official festive events' (constructive, evidence-grounded).
3R-CARE NOTE: critique scoped to procurement and policy choices, not to communities or the religious meaning of Raya.
CLEARED legacyAudit (rebuild complete per CLAUDE.md Accuracy Standard).
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): Cabinet cancellation order; catering 50-60% of budgets; other Muslim states scaled down rather than eliminated.
